_comment: Single source of truth for version pins, ports, paths, and defaults shared across the npm and Docker install paths. Read by scripts/dev-safe.mjs, scripts/dev-with-automation.mjs, docker/entrypoint.sh (via generated defaults.env), and .github/workflows/docker.yml.
_agentServerGitRefComment: Set to pin the dev agent-server to a specific software-agent-sdk commit/branch. Takes precedence over versions.agentServer when present. Current pin: software-agent-sdk PR #3347 + the deadlock fix PR #3349 merged in (commit 6aeb0817b) — surfaces current_model_name and fixes the stats_callback re-entry that hung every ACP turn.
